mapper.select: SELECT id, return_request_id AS "returnRequestId", state_id AS "stateId", flow_id AS "flowId", created_time AS "createdAt" FROM return_processing_saga AND return_request_id = #{returnRequestId}AND state_id = #{stateId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM return_processing_saga AND state_id = #{stateId}
